top_signals.title: Leading in the Dark: How Submarine Commanders Think Under Uncertainty
top_signals.summary:
We had been tracking the contact for six hours.The acoustic signature was ambiguous. The geometry was incomplete. The tactical picture had shifted twice in the preceding hour.I ordered battle stations anyway. Not because I was certain, I was not. I ordered it because the decision window was closing. Waiting for certainty was no longer a strategy, it was a risk. That moment — the space between incomplete knowledge and irreversible action — is where submarine command lives. It is where I spent 14 years.Modern militaries have spent decades trying to eliminate that space. Networked sensors, satellite surveillance, and instantaneous communications

The post Leading in the Dark: How Submarine Commanders Think Under Uncertainty appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Compute Market is Broken: Midha
top_signals.summary: Anjney Midha, founder of AMP, founding investor of Anthropic, and former general partner at Andreessen Horowitz, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." AMP aims to secure 1.3 GW of compute for the independent ecosystem over the next four years, deploying roughly $40B across equity, debt, and structured capital.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Canadian fighter pilot school to get M-346 trainer jets from Leonardo
top_signals.summary: The ITPS currently trains pilots on the Aero Vodochody L-39 and is working with over ten air forces to provide advanced jet training, the school CEO said.

top_signals.title: Three Charts Capturing Micron’s Record Rise to $1 Trillion
top_signals.summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s incredible rally this year has launched the memory-chip firm into an elite group of stocks worth at least $1 trillion, setting at least one record along the way.

top_signals.title: Mortgage refinance demand drops 18% as rates hit highest level since August
top_signals.summary: Mortgage rates rose to the highest level in nine months, hitting refinance demand hardest. Homebuyers also pulled back but were still more active than last year.

top_signals.title: First unit of JAXA’s new ISS resupply craft completes missions
top_signals.summary: The HTV-X1 delivered supplies to the international space station and then carried out missions in orbit around the Earth in and after March this year.
